description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a sleek, matte black metal body and a distinctive folding skeletonized stock finished in a reddish-brown color. The rifle features a long, slender barrel extending from a cylindrical receiver, with a prominent vertical magazine well and a detachable box magazine. The grip is ergonomically angled and ribbed for better handling, and a trigger guard is clearly visible beneath the receiver. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with a simple front post and rear notch. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external attachments, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a folding skeletonized stock and detachable box magazine. Features include iron sights, a ribbed grip, and a long slender barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, folding skeletonized stock, ribbed grip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the slim profile and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the folding skeletonized stock, grip, and magazine, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: End-on view from the stock side, showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
